subject: ASAP: Software Engineer – Java
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: NordPlay
ROLE: Senior Software Engineer
START: 2024-08-01
DURATION: 12 months
LOCATION: Malmö / hybrid
RATE: To be discussed

The team works primarily with Java, AWS, Docker and BigQuery.

Key requirements:

  • Java
  • AWS
  • Docker
  • BigQuery

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Anna Berg
Senior Recruitment Consultant
NordStaff AB
Tel: +46 72 123 45 67
